subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh of the divine remembrance! When the Morn of eternity illumined the horizon of the world, the bats were thrown into confusion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی صبح قدم چون مشرق عالمرا روشن نمود خفاشان پریشان شدند که ای
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @apocalyptic imagery, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
